case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. MARK ANTHONY MEDINA

docket_entries.description: AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604

MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order. (301/PJB/) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
